hallucination.rationale: The generated note is entirely internal reasoning/scratchpad and never produces a final clinical note. However, the content discussed in the reasoning is faithful to the transcript with no fabricated findings.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is raw chain-of-thought reasoning rather than a formatted clinical note. It completely fails to produce the requested output, instead exposing internal deliberation including an infinite loop on vital signs formatting.

completeness.rationale: No actual clinical note was produced. While the reasoning touches on most transcript content, the final deliverable is missing entirely, so no transcript content is captured in a usable note.
missed_items: No final note produced — all transcript content is effectively missing from the output

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was output. The entire output is unstructured internal reasoning with no template sections rendered.

entity_marking.rationale: No final note was produced, so no entity marking appears in any deliverable output.

duplication.rationale: The output contains massive duplication — the same vital signs reasoning block is repeated hundreds of times in an apparent infinite loop.
